name: E2E: the routing table is bijective with the manifest — every tool is reachable from a kind and every routed tool resolves to a real manifest entry (no orphans, no ghosts)
command: ruby -ryaml -rjson -e 'man=JSON.parse(File.read(ARGV[0]))["tools"].map{|t| t["tool"]}; r=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[1]); routed=[]; ["linguist_aliases","iac_dialects","purl_uses","cross_cutting"].each{|a| (r[a]||{}).each{|k,v| Array(v).each{|e| routed<<e["tool"] if e["tool"]}}}; (r["bundles"]||{}).each{|k,v| Array(v).each{|e| routed<<e["tool"] if e["tool"]}}; routed.uniq!; ign=["prose-judge.sh"]; orphan=man-routed-ign; ghost=routed-man-ign; STDERR.puts("orphan="+orphan.inspect+" ghost="+ghost.inspect); exit((orphan.empty? && ghost.empty?) ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/toolchain.json" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/kind-to-tool-routing.yaml" && echo every-tool-bijectively-routed 1>&2
